# Generated vs Hand-Written Files

Source of truth: `.gitattributes` marks all generated files.

## Generated files (NEVER edit directly)

These are owned by the codegen pipeline (`just generate`). Changes go through
`seeds/seed.manual.toml` or the generator scripts.

## Testing files

- `tests/generated/` — Auto-generated test scaffolds (NEVER edit)
- `tests/manual/` — Hand-written tests (this is where you write)
- `tests/golden/` — Snapshot tests for stability
- `examples/cookbook/` — Runnable examples (hand-written)
